entities.name: VoiceThoughts folder
entities.context: A folder used for organizing and processing audio files

entities.name: File watcher
entities.context: A tool that detects new files

entities.name: LLM prompt
entities.context: A prompt used for classifying content with a language model

entities.name: style guide prompt
entities.context: A prompt used for transforming content according to a style guide

entities.name: Review queue
entities.context: A system for evaluating content before approval

entities.name: Publish
entities.context: The action of making content publicly available

relationships.context: File watcher is used to detect new files in the VoiceThoughts folder
Files in the VoiceThoughts folder are classified using LLM prompt
Files in the VoiceThoughts folder are transformed using style guide prompt
Files in the VoiceThoughts folder enter the review queue for evaluation
Items in the review queue are approved before publishing
